title: gonolobus exannulatus
intro: Gonolobus exannulatus, also known as the small yellow orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Gonolobus exannulatus include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help alleviate congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of Gonolobus exannulatus are typically made by drying the plant's roots and leaves, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea or decoction.
